chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-5185 of 2021 CP No.D-5186 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 18.06.2025 Ch. Muhammad Saeed-uz-Zaman, advocate for the petitioners Mr. Abdul Samad Memon, advocate for respondents No.1 to 3 Mr. Wajiha M. Mehdi, AAG --------- Learned counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, seeks to withdraw the instant petitions subject to him being at liberty to file fresh petitions as both the petitioners have now retired. Order accordingly. Both petitions are disposed of in the above terms. Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
